meta.intent: Practice ice route value on a denser board with a few plausible but lower-value side clears.
meta.expectedPath: Use a dock-safe route clear near the ice, break the iced lane, then clear the revealed material before broad side groups matter.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player treats ice as optional cleanup, takes side groups, and lets dock residue or water tempo crowd the rescue.
meta.whatItProves: The L21 ice-route read survives a real-board layout with one crate-shaped route tax.
meta.notes: Role: practice. Crates frame the lane but are not the main problem; the target starts close enough that ice remains the visible investment.
